summary: Completed Investment Explainability UI testing for the Investments tab. All features working correctly: 271 stocks analyzed, category tabs (Hot/Bullish/Undervalued/Watch/Bearish) display correct counts, expanded card view renders all sections conditionally based on data availability.

minor.issue: Returns 500 when Alpaca API keys are invalid - pre-existing issue, not related to current testing scope

passed_tests: Investments page loads with 271 stocks analyzed badge
Category tabs display correct counts: Hot (15), Bullish (15), Undervalued (15), Watch (15), Bearish (20)
Browse All tab shows 271 stocks with pagination (Page 1 of 10)
Clicking stock card expands to show detailed view
Score Breakdown section with 5 bars (Valuation, Quality, Growth, Strength, Risk) - VERIFIED
Valuation Summary section (P/E Ratio, EV/EBITDA, Fair Value, Classification) - VERIFIED
Business Quality section (ROE, Net Margin, Gross Margin, Quality Rating) - VERIFIED
Growth Profile section (Revenue Growth, EPS Growth, Trend, Rating) - VERIFIED
Score Boosters section displays when data available - VERIFIED
Score Detractors section displays when data available (conditional) - VERIFIED
Bull Case bullet points display when data available - VERIFIED
Bear Case bullet points display when data available (conditional) - VERIFIED on Bearish stocks
Key Risks badges display when data available (conditional) - VERIFIED on Bearish stocks
AI Analysis summary text always displays - VERIFIED
Percentile Rank displays when data available - VERIFIED
Biggest weakness indicator displays when data available - VERIFIED
Filter panel works (Show Filters button, Market Cap/Sector/Signal/Min Score filters)
Apply Filters and Reset buttons functional
Pagination works for Browse All tab (tested page 2)
No console errors when expanding/collapsing cards
Category badges (Hot/Bullish/Undervalued/Watch/Bearish/Overpriced) display correctly on cards
critical_code_review_comments: Conditional rendering for Bear Case, Key Risks, and Score Detractors is correctly implemented - sections only appear when data arrays have content
API returns complete data structure with all required fields (bear_case, risks, score_drivers.detractors)
Bullish stocks (like MU) have empty bear_case/risks arrays - this is expected behavior
Bearish stocks (like WERN) have populated bear_case/risks arrays - sections render correctly
seed_data_creation: None required - app uses real-time financial data from FMP API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Investment Explainability UI fully tested. All sections render correctly based on data availability. Conditional sections (Bear Case, Key Risks, Score Detractors) only appear when the corresponding data arrays have content. Tested on both bullish stocks (MU - no bear case) and bearish stocks (WERN - has bear case and risks). No console errors during card expand/collapse operations.

always_displayed: Score Breakdown (5 bars: Valuation, Quality, Growth, Strength, Risk)
